sql_query.query: SELECT id, services::text AS services, message, reactions::text AS reactions, created_at::text AS created_at, ts_rank(to_tsvector('english', message), plainto_tsquery('english', $1))::float8 AS rank FROM _inquiry WHERE wall_status = 'approved' AND to_tsvector('english', message) @@ plainto_tsquery('english', $1) ORDER BY rank DESC, (COALESCE(reactions->>'same','0')::int + COALESCE(reactions->>'not_alone','0')::int) DESC LIMIT 1
